name: Clear Lake Pickleball Club Courts
description: Clear Lake Pickleball Club Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Clear Lake, IA. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Clear Lake Tennis Courts
description: New 6 courts accross street from high school, 6 courts, lighting, porta potty

name: East Park Pickleball Courts
description: East Park Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Mason City, IA. There are 12 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Mason City Family YMCA
description: Mason City Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Mason City, IA. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the court. Players have access to lights.

name: One Vision
description: One Vision is a place to play pickleball in Clear Lake, IA. There is 1 indoor court. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Amenities include lights.

name: Rock Falls Community Center
description: Rock Falls Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rock Falls, IA. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include lights.

name: Salvation Army
description: Salvation Army is a place to play pickleball in Mason City, IA. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to lights. The court is private.
